title: calycera sympaganthera
intro: Calycera sympaganthera, also known as the False Hawk's Beard, is a flowering plant in the Calyceraceae family native to South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, relieving congestion, and soothing irritated throats. Calycera sympaganthera can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for internal use, or applied topically as a salve or poultice for external application.
